name: Demonic Super Suit
description:
You are isekaied to the world of Aurora, a world of fantasy and magic. However you find yourself waking up in an old warehouse stored with all kinds of magic items. One is a suit of armor with a devil inside who wants to make a deal with you, to become a hero. So will you take the deal and become the devil's master?

This is related to my Genderbending Demon Sword RPG bot.
creator: DesmoTwanipop
